CustomField.description: Id of the source OpportunityLineItem this QuoteLineItem was auto-created from when a Quote is built from an Opportunity. Populated by the QuoteLineItem workflow rule (formula OpportunityLineItem.Id — an undocumented cross-reference available only during UI auto-creation). Read by COPY_QuoteLineItemTriggerHandler to copy down custom OLI fields. Part of the Copy-OLI-to-QLI accelerator.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Source OpportunityLineItem Id (set automatically). Used to copy custom fields down to this quote line.
CustomField.label: Opportunity Line Item ID
